channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Dozens of migrants still missing off Djibouti's coast after smugglers forced them out of boats
item.description: MOGADISHU, Somalia (AP) — Rescuers searched Thursday for dozens of migrants from Africa still missing after smugglers apparently forced them out of two boats in the Red Sea off the coast of Djibouti earlier this week, the Djiboutian coast guard said.
item.dc:creator: OMAR FARUK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: How Black leaders in New York are grappling with Eric Adams and representation
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It wasn’t a shock to many Black New Yorkers that Mayor Eric Adams has surrounded himself with African American civil rights leaders, clergy and grassroots activists since his indictment last week on federal bribery charges.
item.dc:creator: AARON MORRISON and MATT BROWN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Voters in 13 states have less than a week to register. When is the deadline in Illinois?
item.description: The 2024 presidential election is fast approaching, and in some states, the voter registration deadline is as soon as this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, WGN 9

item.title: Jury mulling fate of 3 former Memphis officers charged in Tyre Nichols' fatal beating
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — The future of three former Memphis officers charged with violating Tyre Nichols' civil rights in a beating that proved fatal is in the hands of a jury after a nearly monthlong federal trial.
item.dc:creator: ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wawa named No. 1 convenience store in consumer satisfaction survey
item.description: Analysts noted that many of the top-ranked chains specialized in ready-to-eat foods prepared in the stores' kitchens.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Men accused of killing Jocelyn Nungaray believed to be Venezuelan gang members: search warrant
item.description: Search warrants reveal how investigators have looked into the social media accounts of the men accused of murdering 12-year-old Jocelyn Nungaray.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Melania Trump: ‘We are dealing with much more danger’
item.description: The former first lady said Wednesday that she thinks Americans need to listen to one another, even if they hold different beliefs.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: The fate of Nibi the beaver lands in court as rescuers try to stop her release into the wild
item.description: Whether a 2-year-old beaver named Nibi gets to stay with the rescuers she has known since she was a baby or must be released into the wild as winter approaches in Massachusetts has ended up in court — and caused such an uproar that even the governor has weighed in.
item.dc:creator: JAMIE STENGLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Israel extends evacuation warnings in Lebanon, signaling a wider offensive
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — The Israeli military on Thursday warned people to evacuate a city and other communities in southern Lebanon that are north of a U.N.-declared buffer zone, signaling that it may widen a ground operation launched earlier this week against the Hezbollah militant group.
item.dc:creator: FADI TAWIL and JACK JEFFERY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: VIDEO: Helene waves and storm surge crash into Florida home as owners watch
item.description: Terrifying moments caught on video showed Hurricane Helene’s powerful and deadly storm surge as it crashed into a home in Pinellas County last week.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricane Helene scrambles politics in 3 battleground states
item.description: The 500-mile-long path of destruction cut by Hurricane Helene has scrambled the politics of three battleground states that could determine control of the White House and Senate: North Carolina, Georgia and Florida.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Influential prophesizing pastors believe reelecting Trump is a win in the war of angels and demons
item.description: Among the nation’s charismatic Christians, there’s one highly politicized faction in particular that believes the reelection of former President Donald Trump would be a win in a literal spiritual war of angels in demons.
item.dc:creator: Peter Smith, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Last pandemic-era student loan benefit ends even as borrowers struggle to make payments
item.description: The last of the pandemic-era student loan benefits are gone, winding down four years of additional help to borrowers that advocates say was never actually enough.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Texas man suspected of aggravated robbery and threatening to cut off woman's finger arrested
item.description: Dallas Police Department arrested a man believed to have taken part in the alleged assault and aggravated robbery of a Texas woman taking more than $75,000 in cash and other items.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The flood of ghost guns is slowing after regulation. It's also being challenged in the Supreme Court
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Guy Boyd was hanging out with friends he had known for years in Ann Arbor, Michigan, on the night an accidental gunshot tore into his head.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Hurricane Helene brings climate change to forefront of the presidential campaign
item.description: The devastation wrought by Hurricane Helene has brought climate change to the forefront of the presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Shock of deadly floods is a reminder of Appalachia’s risk from violent storms in a warming climate
item.description: HENDERSONVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Hurricane Helene dumped trillions of gallons of water hundreds of miles inland, devastating communities nestled in mountains far from the threat of storm surge or sea level rise.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL PHILLIS and BRITTANY PETERSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Man who was mad about Chinese spy balloon is convicted of threatening former Speaker McCarthy
item.description: BILLINGS, Mont. (AP) — A Montana man was convicted Wednesday of threatening to assault former House Speaker Kevin McCarthy after becoming upset that the government had not shot down a Chinese spy balloon that floated over his home city.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW BROWN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Deadly Maui fire erupted from earlier blaze believed to have been extinguished, investigation finds
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — The wildfire that killed at least 102 people on Maui last year erupted from an earlier brushfire, sparked by downed power lines, that firefighters believed they had extinguished, officials confirmed Wednesday as they presented their findings on the cause. The Aug.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and JENNIFER SINCO KELLEHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Shoppers are panic-buying toilet paper amid port strike, but experts say there’s no need
item.description: “Hope you have some toilet paper stock piled. It’s started. Sam’s and Costco are depleted,” one user said on the social media platform X.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, Fox 5

item.title: South Texas border mourns native son Kris Kristofferson
item.description: The recent death of actor and singer-songwriter Kris Kristofferson is being felt on the South Texas border where he was born and often returned to visit.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, Fox 5

item.title: Melania Trump in new memoir calls abortion a 'woman's fundamental right': Report
item.description: “Why should anyone other than the woman herself have the power to determine what she does with her own body?" asks the former first lady.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: FBI searching for serial bank robber dubbed the 'Bare-Chested Bandit'
item.description: Agents are now offering a $1,000 reward for information that could lead directly to his arrest and conviction.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, NewsNation

item.title: Wyoming town told to 'ready' for evacuation as wildfire spreads 32,000 acres
item.description: The town of Dayton, Wyoming, has been put on a "ready to evacuate" status as a massive wildfire continues to spread across the Bighorn National Forest just six miles away.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: ACLU lawsuit details DWI scheme rocking Albuquerque police
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — A civil rights group is suing the city of Albuquerque, its police department and top officials on behalf of a man who was among those arrested on suspicion of driving while intoxicated and allegedly forced to pay bribes to get the charges dropped.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN MONTOYA BRYAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Bank of America is having service issues and account access problems: Downdetector
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Some Bank of America users reported problems accessing their funds online Wednesday. Some online services appear to be down, according to Downdetector. A message on the Bank of America app states, “Accounts Temporarily Unavailable.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, KRON4

item.title: Trump rejects calls for another debate with Harris after VP showdown
item.description: Former President Donald Trump again rejected the prospect of another debate with Vice President Kamala Harris late Tuesday following a showdown between the two vice presidential nominees, saying he was "not looking to do it again.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KRON4

item.title: After Helene cuts roads, power, phones, Southerners stay in touch the old-fashioned way
item.description: In remote mountain areas, helicopters hoisted the stranded to safety while search crews waded through floodwaters and moved toppled trees so they could look door to door for survivors.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: CBS cuts mics of Vance, Walz during immigration argument
item.description: The sparring started when Brennan clarified for debate viewers that Springfield “does have a large number of Haitian migrants who have legal status, temporary protected status.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Walz misleadingly claims to have been in Hong Kong during period tied to Tiananmen Square massacre
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Multiple news reports indicate that Democratic vice presidential nominee Minnesota Gov.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and DIDI TANG Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A Texas man is executed for fatally stabbing twin teenage girls in 1989
item.description: HUNTSVILLE, Texas (AP) — A Texas man convicted of fatally stabbing twin 16-year-old girls more than three decades ago was executed on Tuesday evening. Garcia Glenn White was pronounced dead at 6:56 p.m. CDT following a chemical injection at the state penitentiary in Huntsville.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO and MICHAEL GRACZYK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Judge rejects computer repairman's defamation claims over reports on Hunter Biden laptop
item.description: DOVER, Del. (AP) — A computer repairman at the center of a controversy over Hunter Biden's laptop has lost his defamation case against news outlets, the president's son and Joe Biden's presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: RANDALL CHASE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Why Tuesday's vice presidential debate could matter more than history suggests
item.description: Tim Walz and JD Vance might have the chance to reshape the political landscape Tuesday in their first and only debate.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Workday down? User reports indicate problems with platform
item.description: Is your Workday down? You might not be alone. According to Downdetector.com, reports of people having problems with Workday spiked shortly after 10 a.m. Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, Fox 5

item.title: After Helene's destruction, a mountain town reliant on fall tourism wonders what's next
item.description: BOONE, N.C. (AP) — Freddie Pell helps lift a vintage wooden chair off the sidewalk and back inside his art gallery. It's starting to rain in downtown Boone, and he doesn't want it to get soaked — again.
item.dc:creator: MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: McDonald’s is bringing back its famous ‘Boo Buckets’ for the Halloween season
item.description: McDonald's famous Boo Buckets are making a return just in time for Halloween. The Boo Buckets, a customer-favorite which doubles as a trick-or-treating bucket, comes with Happy Meals. The company will introduce a blue bucket this year, replacing last year’s purple one.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Mississippi justices reject latest appeal from man on death row since 1976
item.description: JACKSON, Miss. (AP) — The Mississippi Supreme Court on Tuesday unanimously denied the latest appeal from a man who has been on the state's death row longer than any other inmate.
item.dc:creator: EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, ABC 4
